Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts product data, promotions, and featured inventory from the live website.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions that customers have submitted through HubSpot.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI agent on R1 Concepts channels, handling product inquiries, order questions, and support requests directly.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover content creators, influencers, and relevant social profiles across platforms.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, brand guidelines, and prompt instructions from Google Drive for use in message generation.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped rotor data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlaps and gaps in current inventory coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC already competes and where new product opportunities exist in the two-piece rotor market.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated customer outreach emails to gather demand data and buying interest for specific two-piece rotor applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real market demand signals directly from customers to validate which product gaps are worth filling, without manual survey coordination.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-references, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a comprehensive, decision-ready catalog output that consolidates multiple data sources into one actionable document for product planning.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting the full ad copy from every creative including headlines, descriptions, and call-to-action fields.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant visibility into every piece of live ad copy across platforms, eliminating the need to manually click through dozens of ad sets and campaigns.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for the specified phrases and flags each match with the exact field location, campaign name, and surrounding context.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance issues, outdated messaging, or unauthorized claims in seconds across hundreds of ads — a task that would take hours of manual review.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends the flagged list as a detailed email report showing every match, the specific ad field where it appeared, and the full copy snippet for quick review.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit report directly to the requester's inbox, enabling immediate corrective action on non-compliant or problematic ad copy.
